title: US government says Iran-linked hackers are disrupting American water and energy providers | TechCrunch
summary: The U.S. government is warning that Iranian state-backed hackers are actively breaking in and disrupting industrial control systems at American water and energy providers. Zack Whittaker is the security editor at TechCrunch.
